objective: Record the verified source-negative C6 package-4 ecological-niche semantics schema-gap audit from exact physical opportunity and organism-subject evidence, without fabricating habitat, resource, hazard, trophic, competition, ecotone or occupancy truth.
next_action: Stop at the verified package-4 schema-gap boundary. A separate owner-routed, code-free authored-hypothesis mathematical/contract design and implementation-readiness package is the next candidate; it is not active or authorized.

research_gate: Body-plan V1, package-3 organism subject identity V1 and the package-4 source-negative schema-gap audit are verified and recorded. Current C3 evidence proves only physical opportunity and coavailability; the separate provenance-bound authored-hypothesis design/readiness candidate remains owner-gated before any contract or source can be frozen.
authority_lane: Owner-routed code-free C6 package-4 ecological-niche semantics schema-gap audit only. Authorizes canonical status reconciliation, exact upstream field and authority inventory, claim classification, adversarial source-negative fixtures, verifier and governance records for habitat, resource, hazard, trophic, competition, ecotone and prospective-occupancy prerequisites. No ecological contract schema or production crate/source; no habitat suitability, resource yield, organism hazard, trophic or competition fact, realized occupancy, species or population membership, physiology, viability, senses, locomotion, behavior, reproduction, heredity, development, evolution, dimorphism applicability, comparison, culture, representation, runtime, filesystem, network, process, Companion, Greenfield, C7, broad G1 closure, promotion authority or Kernel mutation.
context_health: C4, C5, body-plan V1, package-3 organism subject identity V1 and the package-4 source-negative schema-gap audit are verified and recorded. The separate package-4 design/readiness candidate, implementation, later C6 packages and C7 remain gated.

macro_findings: The owner retained the canonical broad route C4 then C5 then C6 then C7 then G1-CLOSEOUT then R1.

C4 and C5 are verified and complete; body-plan V1, package-3 organism subject identity V1 and the C6 package-4 ecological-niche source-negative schema-gap audit are verified and recorded. The separate package-4 design/readiness candidate, C7, broad G1-CLOSEOUT and R1 remain gated.
The five current C6 prototype seams pass 38 focused tests but prove only generic semantic construction, physical opportunity, hypothetical lineage binding and structural evidence completeness.
Physical opportunity is owned by C3 and is not an ecological niche; representation, geometry, animation and visual quality remain C7-owned.
Body-plan family/topology V1 is verified and recorded after the exact 17+1 matrix and registered gate run-e923d74fb96743e5864b303faf27acfc.

The completed owner route released only the code-free package-4 ecological-niche schema-gap audit; its separate authored-hypothesis design/readiness candidate, implementation and every later C6 package remain gated.
micro_findings: Focused counts are exact: semantic-construction 14, organism-niche-binding 5, niche-graph-binding 7, macro-lineage-binding 6 and person-form-eligibility 6.
Five C6-specific desktop ProofReceipt bindings pass within a 17-test read-only receipt replay; this is not runtime integration.
The niche-graph result is a C3 physical opportunity precursor, the lineage body-plan reference is opaque, and person-form output is structural completeness only.

Eighty-two exact hostile IDs cover evidence, ecology, anatomy, physiology, identity, evolution, ecomorphs, capacities, comparative eligibility, applicable variation, aging, end-to-end authority and reproduction/development/heredity.

Three independent reviews froze family versus expression identity, a graph rather than universal tree, exact homology/presence/cardinality/symmetry semantics, 18 test groups, engineering resource bounds and one macro-lineage consumer.
Registered run-e923d74fb96743e5864b303faf27acfc passed the complete Forge gate in 874785 ms and the body-plan result is recorded.
Package 3 now supplies strict lineage, form-template, species-candidate, individual and population identity without membership or biology claims.
Dependency order selects package 4 ecological-niche semantics before physiology, reproduction, heredity, development or applicable dimorphism.

Current niche-graph evidence proves physical opportunity and coavailability only; habitat suitability, resource yield, organism hazard, trophic flow, competition and ecological ecotone truth are evidence-blocked.
Exact finite sample topology, physical component adjacency and subject identity are bounded prerequisites, not ecological truth.
A provenance-bound authored-hypothesis seam is design-ready for separate code-free design/readiness with one non-cyclic organism-niche consumer; no contract or source is authorized.

visual_quality_gate.rationale: Package-4 readiness is code-free and data-contract-only; geometry, assets, animation, renderer and visual-quality claims remain C7-owned and excluded.

tiers_completed.result: Three parallel whole-context audits reconciled the C6 canon, retained bounded prototypes, dependency boundaries and the user's dimorphism concern.
The retained C6 prototypes provide 38 bounded tests across five crates, but remain partial non-closure evidence.
Seventeen retained read-only ProofReceipt consumers demonstrate exact C4/C5 evidence consumption without granting C6 source authority.
Exactly 82 hostile identities across 13 domains are frozen and mechanically countable before source.
The corrected candidate order places variation-capable topology, reproduction, heredity and development before applicable dimorphism and comparative person form.
The first source candidate remains separately gated and cannot generalize the bounded humanoid mannequin into universal organism structure.
Biological sex, reproductive role, dimorphism, caste, social role, identity and capability are explicitly separated.
Nonhuman reproduction and development controls include asexual, hermaphroditic, sequential and caste/polyphenic cases without inheriting a human binary.
The exact implementation route and first deliberately failing Rust test are established before production source.

Three independent successor audits and an exact upstream field inventory reject automatic ecological truth while selecting only a provenance-bound authored-hypothesis seam for separate design/readiness.

simulation_ladder.unresolved_risk: Aggregate physical opportunities could be laundered into local habitat suitability, resource yield, organism-specific harm, trophic flow, competition, ecotones or occupancy without exact spatial, subject and causal evidence.
simulation_ladder.expected_information_gain: A source-negative authority audit will identify which ecological semantics are derivable from current canonical evidence, which require new upstream inputs, and whether one bounded package-4 schema can be honestly frozen.
simulation_ladder.estimated_cost: One code-free schema-gap and readiness record, exact hostile fixtures, route and canonical consistency shields, independent review and one complete measured Forge gate only after focused checks pass.
simulation_ladder.regression_guard: No mutation of C3, body-plan or identity owners; no implementation source; no realized occupancy, physiology, reproduction, heredity, development, dimorphism, C7, runtime, Companion, Greenfield or Forge authority.
simulation_ladder.stop_condition: Stop at a separately named ecological-niche implementation decision if and only if exact source authority, schema, resources, hostiles, consumer and rollback boundaries are frozen; otherwise record the precise evidence blocker.
simulation_ladder.final_integration_gate: The source-negative readiness verifier, hostile route tests, canonical projections and complete measured Forge gate must pass before readiness is recorded.

exit_criteria.label: Family/expression identity, typed graph semantics, 18 tests, exact resources, fixtures, consumer, rollback and exclusions are frozen before source.
The standalone capability-free crate passes all 18 positive and hostile test groups with strict canonical codecs and no partial output.
Macro-lineage validates only an exact fully valid family ID while retaining its existing constructor and bytes.
Focused suites, native/i686/Android classifications, module and route shields, independent review and one registered full gate pass without activating package 3.
Distinct typed identities, exact C4 subject replay, 33 groups, resources, one consumer, rollback and source-negative authority are frozen and independently reviewed.
Seven strict typed records, a private validated bundle and authority-negative receipt pass the exact 33-group matrix with cumulative resource preflight.
The one person-form consumer uses a genuinely replay-validated bundle and exact family/expression evidence while preserving the legacy report.
Focused suites, native/i686/Android classifications, retained shields, independent review and the registered full gate pass without activating later C6 semantics.
Exact upstream authority, non-cyclic ownership, claim classifications and source-negative hostiles are recorded, with automatic ecological truth blocked and any hypothesis-only design seam bounded.

unresolved_risks: Aggregate or regional C3 values may be insufficient to prove local habitat suitability, resource accessibility or ecotone continuity.
A physical exposure may be mislabeled as an organism-specific hazard without physiology and tolerance evidence.
Trophic flow or competition could be fabricated without exact subjects, conserved resource flow and limiting-demand evidence.
Prospective occupancy could be confused with realized occupancy, species membership, viability, evolution or population distribution.
Making identity or macro-lineage consume downstream ecology would create a dependency cycle and silently change completed owners.
Dimorphism could be pulled forward before reproduction, heredity, development, ecomorph and species-authored applicability prerequisites exist.
Species membership policy must be explicitly assigned before package-9 variation can apply a species-authored dimorphism rule to an individual; population distributions may remain later.
evidence_requirements: trace every habitat, resource, hazard, trophic, competition, ecotone and prospective-occupancy field to exact canonical upstream evidence or mark it unavailable
freeze a standalone non-cyclic package-4 owner that consumes physical opportunity and strict subject identity without mutating completed owners
map C6-H100 through H105 plus applicable H1100, H1101, H1102, H1103, H1105, H1106 and H1108 to executable source-negative fixtures
freeze exact codecs, resource classifications, atomic no-partial-output behavior, one-consumer scope, portability classifications and deletion-only rollback before source
preserve indeterminate evidence gaps and the no-physiology, no-realized-occupancy, no-dimorphism, no-C7, no-runtime and no-Forge-authority boundary
verification_plan: reconcile every stale canonical claim about the recorded package-3 source result
audit exact upstream fields and authority for each package-4 ecological claim before freezing any schema
run source-negative hostile fixtures for evidence substitution, category laundering, cycles, partial output, resource ambiguity and authority drift
obtain independent biology, schema/security and integration/governance reviews and repair every blocker
verify Atlas, operating-system, module context, record roles and retained C4/C5/C6 routes, then pass one complete measured Forge gate before recording readiness
resume_after: The source-negative package-4 schema-gap audit is verified and recorded. Do not activate its separate authored-hypothesis design/readiness candidate or implement source without a new exact owner route; do not activate physiology, reproduction, heredity, development, realized occupancy, dimorphism, population semantics, comparison or C7.
evidence: GP3 closed cleanly in commit 7f29f6b and registered run-50a8c78043eb46c483f1f655d3793f9b.
C4V closed cleanly in commit 34f2213 and registered run-fa6334a300e04d409dd5cddb4f22542e.
The owner rejected an early runtime shortcut and authorized continuation of the canonical broad route C4-C7 then G1-CLOSEOUT then R1.
C4 depends exactly on C2 and promoted C3A; C3B remains independent and blocked.
Four existing C4-owned modules pass 33 of 33 focused tests while retaining no runtime, storage, network or filesystem capability.
Independent GP4 pre-source acceptance recorded after the composed readiness gate passed in 73.9 seconds with the source crate absent and all exact hostile mutations failing closed.
Both independent reviewers accepted the source candidate after 9 of 9 focused hostile tests, strict received-evidence replay, capability audit, formatting and focused clippy passed.
The 100.8-second GP4 focused integration verifier passed formatting, clippy, 9 hostile vertical tests, retained GP0-GP3 and C4V tests, computation readiness and all readiness hostiles.

Registered invocation run-fd385f42fd5a4ee68b5e965463e2d8f1 was deliberately aborted and recorded failed after 310191 ms when pre-closeout audit found missing successor-route verifier coverage; it is superseded and is not completion evidence.

Registered invocation run-7e5c44dc8f48424a8cec42da756e3127 passed the complete Forge gate in 590582 ms.
G1_VERTICAL_CLOSEOUT_RECEIPT.json remains immutable verified predecessor evidence.
Three independent read-only audits identified the minimal C4 closure route and exact stale canonical claims before source.
C4 local implementation verifier passed 58 core, 8 receipt and 8 portability hostile owners with semantic SHA-256 263a7c274c5bbfb5a48f0a7ccf3462eb35ddc7c96c1c92ff01d8ef37a40f6996.
Two fresh native processes and same-host Windows i686 execution emitted identical semantic bytes; aarch64-linux-android compiled only. None is independent second-platform execution.
The bounded 27-path C4 implementation, fixture and verification source manifest SHA-256 is 022e29d8cbc31459656ac36aabcefe656632005f6df47057b97185b57bad5557.

Local platform observations bind clean source commit f505c82bc9303b3426a4530d0a8deec6eede400a and canonical LF-normalized tracked-tree manifest SHA-256 f9089b4d62bd789c514c152e600607fcdeb0b762c0888b19115feb193b7f0e8b.
Hosted run 29671494578 executed and attested historical source f0c3c4f but strict import rejected its CRLF/LF tracked-tree mismatch before writing canonical evidence; it is diagnostic-only.

GitHub-hosted run 29671881585 independently executed and attested clean source 8651038; strict import created G1_C4_INDEPENDENT_PLATFORM_EXECUTION.json with receipt SHA-256 75d27618497c5432c10f86fd2dd25759185238cd3bbf264a583b3743b228542b.

The first registered post-import gate replayed the C4 attestation, then failed on C3 closure-register retention drift; the register now preserves current superseded-C3/promoted-C3A/blocked-C3B truth plus residual/ecotone anchors, and all five affected focused shields pass.

The second registered attempt passed the C3 repair and later failed because three retained GP3/GP4/vertical-closeout verifiers omitted only c4-independent-platform-gate; exact-stage additions and the existing forged-route successor suite now pass without widening authority.

The third registered attempt passed through retained hosted-attestation replay and the repaired successor routes, then failed because the local observation verifier incorrectly required historical and rebuilt MSVC debug PE bytes to match. Two clean target-directory builds produced distinct executable hashes with exact semantic output; the bounded repair validates both hashes as per-execution identities without weakening hosted same-run artifact equality.

GitHub-hosted run 29672946787 independently executed and attested exact repaired source f505c82; strict import and retained cryptographic replay verify result SHA-256 733d453f0831cdaafefa9d4a9e24b1494f339b0b56f4441264009c9fcc3254cd. The prior 8651038 receipt remains archived intact.
Three independent C5 audits reconciled canonical obligations, 2,134 lines of retained code and adversarial gaps; 18 focused tests and the historical F5 verifier pass but do not close C5.
G1_C5_CLOSURE_READINESS.md freezes exactly eight domains, superseding contract decisions, a minimal additive candidate, 92 hostile IDs and the capability-negative owner gate before source.

The hardened C5 candidate passes 90 Rust tests, strict Clippy, all 92 frozen hostile mappings and ten composed pressure scenarios; fresh independent re-review accepted advancement to portability only.

C5 local portability observation at source 9e48dd1 retains semantic SHA-256 88e2be61586e728613fe2c7bf5b947074459fc5f63d6e5f13d4f4648e64624eb across two fresh Windows x64 processes and same-host i686, with Android ARM64 classified compile-only and all authority flags false.

GitHub-hosted run 29678602236 executed exact source 9e48dd1 in two overlapping native Linux x64 processes; credential-separated attestation, local cryptographic replay and fresh independent review accepted portability for the isolated proof contract only.

The current C6 prerequisite replay passes exactly 38 focused prototype tests: 14 semantic-construction, 5 organism-niche-binding, 7 niche-graph-binding, 6 macro-lineage-binding and 6 person-form-eligibility tests.
Seventeen read-only Forge desktop ProofReceipt tests pass, including the five C6 prerequisite vectors; they do not establish runtime integration.

The owner flagged sexual dimorphism before source. Whole-context and independent adversarial review found the two-fixture body-plan intent was valid but variation arrived too late, biological reproduction/heredity lacked a positive package, H6 reproducibility was easy to misread as reproduction, and the published hostile ranges totalled 72 rather than the claimed 68.

Corrected G1_C6_CLOSURE_READINESS.md freezes 82 exact hostile IDs across 13 domains, a coordinate-free variation-capable body-plan substrate with a withheld-morphology control, and explicit reproduction, development, heredity, applicability, dimorphism/polymorphism, culture-boundary and exact aging work while leaving source separately gated.

Registered full Forge gate run-f51cc195a0f54ad88beeeb5d809780e9 passed the pre-audit verification scope in 801062 ms against checkpoint SHA-256 1ef8262aeec211b91b0ade71768caefc538a97a6cd888231ec43510e41d05532.

An initial outer-runner timeout interrupted run-5a739eaaefc940359fccb610bbf3ead9 after 14692 ms; the correctly bounded replacement run-fcbfd6e3df844cd2b3ece02c48ba9e5c passed the then-current repository scope in 833406 ms.

A governance audit found that the production orchestration omitted the C6 readiness verifier and hostiles. Run-78b4c2ea6ce148c5a3c5349e7c9949db failed on uncommitted protected drift and run-833dd1ec547e443d916e623f6f22831e failed on an unclassified orchestration delta; both fail-closed receipts are retained.

The orchestration was explicitly registered in the production gate and reclassified through the retained C4/C5 shields. Run-818500121b3f4958ac093b105a7fe61b then passed in 788754 ms with C6 readiness, hostile and successor-route checks present.

The owner continued work after the corrected C6 audit, releasing only body-plan structure V1. Three independent read-only reviews froze the standalone schema, 18 test groups, engineering bounds and one-consumer boundary.

Test-first implementation first failed because the body-plan library did not exist, then exposed and corrected recursion, canonical identity, resource preflight, budget-accounting and capability-audit defects before passing.
The final focused verifier passes 17 body-plan groups plus one macro-lineage consumer group, strict Clippy, same-host native x64 and i686 execution, and Android ARM64 compile-only classification.
Two structurally distinct humanoid expressions share the pinned family identity while retaining distinct expression identities; V1 contains no sex or dimorphism applicability labels.

Registered run-57db0fb7534941d7a536bea252149e6b failed after 52098 ms because a retained C6 readiness hostile performed an old-route no-op authority mutation; the fixture now mutates either authorized route and the failed receipt remains diagnostic evidence.

Replacement registered run-e923d74fb96743e5864b303faf27acfc passed the complete Forge gate in 874785 ms with the body-plan implementation verifier, exact 17+1 matrix, retained predecessor shields and full workspace tests present.

The package-3 implementation passes the exact 33-group matrix with seven strict identity/binding records, exact macro-lineage/body-plan/C4 replay, two distinct individuals on one humanoid form, radial controls and cumulative fail-before-work budgets.

A real integration fixture calls the public identity-bound person-form consumer through production constructors; three independent source-security, test and integration reviews accepted the final candidate.
Registered full gate run-500f816d66e94a359e9cf8617982bf49 passed the complete Forge scope in 853579 ms with the result verifier present; native and i686 execute, Android ARM64 remains compile-only.
